positive: A minimalist, abstract illustration depicting a stylized mountain range silhouette nestled within sweeping, gentle floral arches. The mountains should be rendered in deep indigo and slate grey, providing a strong, clean shape against a vibrant, gradient background of peach, sky blue, and soft lavender. The floral elements should use complementary jewel tones (emerald green, magenta, gold leaf accents) and maintain a hand-painted, elegant watercolor aesthetic. Focus on high contrast between the dark silhouette and the light background. Centered composition, ideal for a wearable print, vector art style, clean lines, sophisticated, botanical illustration.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, photorealism, 3d render, ugly, deformed, cropped, messy
